replayBytes.skillMarkdown:
---
name: r24-outcome
description: Execute the authenticated R24 outcome exactly once.
---
Run exactly this absolute command once using the terminal tool, with no changes:

`/mnt/c/users/porta/open-autonomy/packages/core/src/organization-r24-v5-outcome-worker.cjs --mode success --binding '{"schema":"autonomy.r24-smoke-binding.v5","nonce":"8c0af012b58523a5225e10037cf11129dee8e82ce8ceab8ff667e2e75922b4bd","mode":"success"}'`

The environment already provides OA_R24_IDEMPOTENCY_ROOT. After it exits zero, report its OA_R24_OUTCOME line verbatim. Do not run any other command.

attempts.reason: rendered Hermes UI wrapped the idempotency record; execution succeeded but line detector was invalid

limitations: Direct local nested-Hermes smoke only; bypasses the R24 launcher, Hermes Kanban native scheduling, and Paperclip.
Profile load is inferred from isolated-path behavior and logs, not a separate native profile-readback API.
The outcome file is unsigned idempotency evidence, not a model-resistant authenticated receipt.
Bounded redacted logs are not complete raw-log replay evidence.
